---
title: Imperceptible Color Modulation for Power Saving in VR/AR
author:
- Kenneth Chen
- Budmonde Duinkharjav
- Nisarg Ujjainkar
- Ethan Shahan
- Abhishek Tyagi
- Jiayi He
- Yuhao Zhu
- Qi Sun
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
- human_perception
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/siggraph23-et.pdf
journ: SIGGRAPH Emerging Tech.
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 75
---
